untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a custom put/call ratio indicator (put/(put+call) based on open buy volume) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. This requires access to options volume data (put and call open buy volumes) that cannot be constructed from the standard price/volume/technical indicators provided. The quintile ranking and daily rebalancing logic also cannot be expressed as simple conditional rules in this framework.
translation_notes: Signal relies on options market data (put/call ratios from open buy volume) which is outside the scope of standard price-based technical indicators. The framework would need custom data sources for options volume and quintile ranking logic to properly implement this strategy.
